org.docgene.model

Class XMLBlockquote

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractParagraph
      • org.docgene.model.XMLBlockquote
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ParagraphElement, ParagraphElementParent, StyledElement

    public class XMLBlockquote
extends org.docgene.model.AbstractParagraph
implements StyledElement
    Represent the content of a blockquote tag.
